runtime_network.ip_addr:
1: lo: <LOOPBACK,UP,LOWER_UP> mtu 65536 qdisc noqueue state UNKNOWN group default qlen 1000
    link/loopback 00:00:00:00:00:00 brd 00:00:00:00:00:00
    inet 127.0.0.1/8 scope host lo
       valid_lft forever preferred_lft forever
    inet6 ::1/128 scope host 
       valid_lft forever preferred_lft forever
2: eth0: <BROADCAST,MULTICAST,UP,LOWER_UP> mtu 1500 qdisc mq state UP group default qlen 1000
    link/ether 7c:ed:8d:6c:19:a4 brd ff:ff:ff:ff:ff:ff
    inet 10.0.2.49/16 metric 100 brd 10.0.255.255 scope global eth0
       valid_lft forever preferred_lft forever
    inet6 fe80::7eed:8dff:fe6c:19a4/64 scope link 
       valid_lft forever preferred_lft forever
3: enP19127s1: <BROADCAST,MULTICAST,SLAVE,UP,LOWER_UP> mtu 1500 qdisc mq master eth0 state UP group default qlen 1000
    link/ether 7c:ed:8d:6c:19:a4 brd ff:ff:ff:ff:ff:ff
    altname enP19127p0s2
    inet6 fe80::7eed:8dff:fe6c:19a4/64 scope link 
       valid_lft forever preferred_lft forever
4: docker0: <NO-CARRIER,BROADCAST,MULTICAST,UP> mtu 1500 qdisc noqueue state DOWN group default 
    link/ether 02:42:8f:ed:e9:89 brd ff:ff:ff:ff:ff:ff
    inet 172.17.0.1/16 brd 172.17.255.255 scope global docker0
       valid_lft forever preferred_lft forever
runtime_network.ip_route:
default via 10.0.0.1 dev eth0 proto dhcp src 10.0.2.49 metric 100 
10.0.0.0/16 dev eth0 proto kernel scope link src 10.0.2.49 metric 100 
10.0.0.1 dev eth0 proto dhcp scope link src 10.0.2.49 metric 100 
168.63.129.16 via 10.0.0.1 dev eth0 proto dhcp src 10.0.2.49 metric 100 
169.254.169.254 via 10.0.0.1 dev eth0 proto dhcp src 10.0.2.49 metric 100 
172.17.0.0/16 dev docker0 proto kernel scope link src 172.17.0.1 linkdown
runtime_network.resolv_conf:
# Dynamic resolv.conf(5) file for glibc resolver(3) generated by resolvconf(8)
#     DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE BY HAND -- YOUR CHANGES WILL BE OVERWRITTEN
# 127.0.0.53 is the systemd-resolved stub resolver.
# run "systemd-resolve --status" to see details about the actual nameservers.

nameserver 127.0.0.53
search edw1tvzko0suvgin0n0cpa3k5f.zx.internal.cloudapp.net
options timeout:1 attempts:5
nameserver 168.63.129.16
runtime_network.hosts_file:
127.0.0.1	localhost
::1	localhost ip6-localhost ip6-loopback
fe00::0	ip6-localnet
ff00::0	ip6-mcastprefix
ff02::1	ip6-allnodes
ff02::2	ip6-allrouters
127.0.0.1	codespaces-09650b
listening_raw: Netid State  Recv-Q Send-Q  Local Address:Port  Peer Address:PortProcess
active_raw: Netid State     Recv-Q Send-Q      Local Address:Port            Peer Address:Port Process
